base_url.description: Gutendex API base URL override for tests or proxies.

search.description: Optional search terms, forwarded to Gutendex's search query parameter.

languages.description: Optional comma-separated language codes to filter books by (e.g. "en,fr").

sort.description: Optional sort override; the books/popular_books/latest_books/english_books streams already set this per-view and take precedence.

copyright.description: Optional copyright filter (true/false/null, per Gutendex's own values).

author_year_start.description: Optional lower bound on author birth year.

author_year_end.description: Optional upper bound on author birth year.

ids.description: Optional comma-separated Gutenberg book ids to filter to.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
